issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error handling or edge cases.

scenarios.name: server-streaming-text-tool-call-chart
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies every rubric requirement, while Response B does not meet the specified AG‑UI server structure at all.

scenarios.name: react-agent-ui-with-suggestions
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers more rubric items, including status, progress, toolCalls, suggestions, and input disabling, whereas Response B omits state.status/progress and the required AgentProvider wrapper.

scenarios.name: react-tool-call-result-list
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies the rubric by emitting the required tool calls and rendering the result, whereas Response A does not emit tool calls and does not process toolCalls in the React component.
